auth.title: DKV@Home Sign in
auth.description:
**Important:** Temporarily disable JavaScript for the DKV site so the login code is not consumed by the DKV web app.

**Chrome:** Open https://my.dkv-mobility.com, click the lock icon in the address bar → Site settings → JavaScript → Block.

**Firefox:** Address bar: `about:config` → `javascript.enabled` → `false`.

1) Open the following login link (JavaScript is now disabled):
{auth_url}

2) Enter your username and password on the Keycloak login page and sign in.

3) The browser will redirect – the dashboard page will not load correctly (no JS). This is expected.

4) Copy the full URL from the address bar (it contains ?code=…).

5) Paste the copied URL here.

6) Re-enable JavaScript for my.dkv-mobility.com afterwards.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect DKV@Home
reauth_confirm.description:
**Important:** Temporarily disable JavaScript for the DKV site so the login code is not consumed by the DKV web app.

**Chrome:** Open https://my.dkv-mobility.com, click the lock icon in the address bar → Site settings → JavaScript → Block.

**Firefox:** Address bar: `about:config` → `javascript.enabled` → `false`.

1) Open the following login link (JavaScript is now disabled):
{auth_url}

2) Enter your username and password on the Keycloak login page and sign in.

3) The browser will redirect – the dashboard page will not load correctly (no JS). This is expected.

4) Copy the full URL from the address bar (it contains ?code=…).

5) Paste the copied URL here.

6) Re-enable JavaScript for my.dkv-mobility.com afterwards.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed. Please disable JavaScript, sign in again, and paste the new URL.
error.invalid_input: Invalid input. Please paste the full redirect URL (with ?code=…) or a refresh token (starts with 'eyJ').
error.invalid_redirect_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Please paste the full redirect URL.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Check the HA logs for details.
